# feat: T1 threshold recalibration + T2 goal-type levers + T4 growth chart

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `81e5df4d3cb7` — feat: T1 threshold recalibration + T2 goal-type levers + T4 growth chart

**Body**:

T1: Adaptive thresholds — income bracket (fresh_grad <8M / mid 8-20M / senior >20M)
and goal-type modifiers (fixed-deadline goals get stricter green threshold +2-3%).
Thresholds now range green 22-37% and yellow 42-58% instead of flat 30/50%.

T2: Fixed-deadline goals (Wedding, Education, Higher Education) skip timeline
extension as a scenario lever. Timeline-lock is enforced via get_timeline_max()
returning a capped value and the timeline optimizer branch skipped entirely.
Wedding caps at 5yr extension, Education at 4yr, Higher Education at 3yr.

T4: Portfolio growth chart replaces trajectory table with st.line_chart in
Portfolio Recommendation page. Goal amount shown as caption reference.

Also fixed compute_blended_return/volatility returning pct not decimal rate
(pre-existing bug caught during C4 review).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
